## Security and privacy review

- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, personal information, host paths, private URLs, private package contents, or raw audit workspaces.
- [ ] I reviewed changes to mounts, permissions, networks, reports, and dependencies.
- [ ] Runtime observations and static heuristics remain clearly distinguished.
- [ ] Documentation and limitations match the implementation.
